overall.description: A cinematic view of the Great Hall from Hogwarts Legacy, featuring a grand gothic dining hall illuminated by hundreds of floating magical candles and warm sunlight streaming through large stained glass windows. Students are seated at long wooden tables while the camera remains stationary, capturing the magical atmosphere of the game environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand gothic dining hall with floating candles and vaulted ceilings

entered.detail: hundreds of magical candles suspended in mid-air throughout the vaulted ceiling, providing warm illumination
large ornate stained glass window at the far end of the hall, casting colored light onto the floor
tall stone gothic archway forming the left wall of the hall with intricate carvings
tall stone gothic archway forming the right wall of the hall with intricate carvings
long wooden dining table with benches, occupied by students
polished stone floor tiles reflecting the candlelight and sunlight

segments.scene_description: A stationary cinematic shot of a grand gothic dining hall illuminated by floating magical candles and sunlight streaming through a large stained glass window. Students sit at long wooden tables while stone archways line the walls. At approximately 40 seconds, a figure in dark robes walks across the foreground from left to right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, cinematic gaze upon a grand gothic dining hall where magical illumination blends with natural light. It begins with a wide view of the space, highlighting hundreds of floating candles and warm sunlight streaming through a large stained glass window. As the camera lingers, the focus remains on the students seated at long wooden tables framed by towering stone archways. The scene then shifts in dynamic energy as a figure in dark robes enters the frame, walking steadily across the foreground from left to right.
